visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman wearing a blue beret and a dark blue off-the-shoulder top standing in a Costco warehouse. She is holding a large plastic container of prepared noodles. Behind her are rows of refrigerated shelves filled with packaged meat and meals under bright warehouse lighting. Her facial expression is animated and friendly as she speaks to the camera. (2) A sharp transition to a close-up of the food label which reads 'CANTONESE FRIED NOODLE WITH BARBECUE PORK' with a price of '$269/KG'. The camera then shows a top-down view of the ingredients inside the package: yellow noodles, sliced pork, green vegetables, carrots, and mushrooms. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen setting where the woman is stir-frying the ingredients in a black wok over a blue gas flame. She uses tongs to toss the pork and vegetables, then adds the noodles and pours a dark brown sauce from a plastic packet. The steam rises as the food cooks. (4) The final phase shows the main woman and another woman in a purple shirt sitting at a wooden dining table in a home environment. The woman in purple is eating the noodles with chopsticks while the main woman gestures enthusiastically, holding up four fingers and pointing to the bowl. The background contains shelves with various small objects and plush toys, illuminated by warm indoor lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你們知道上次的好市多日式炒麵超好吃嗎. [Variety]: 焼きそば, 269元 好吃嗎. (2) [Subtitle]: 廣式叉燒炒麵 雖然是臺灣人做的廣式 但是我們要相信他. (3) [Subtitle]: 而且它超便宜 剛剛那些炒飯都要400塊以上. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個只要276 哇 不到300元. (5) [Subtitle]: 先拌炒配料. (6) [Subtitle]: 下麵囉. (7) [Subtitle]: 下醬料. (8) [Variety]: 你月底的好朋友. [Subtitle]: 你月底的好朋友 廣式叉燒炒麵. (9) [Subtitle]: 它這一大盒我們煮半份就有那麼多 所以它一盒我們覺得可以 4個大人用 沒有問題哦. (10) [Subtitle]: 他的叉燒肉太厲害了 非常的軟嫩. (11) [Subtitle]: 然後味道也剛剛好 不會太硬或者是太重鹹. (12) [Subtitle]: 他的肉我覺得是裡面的靈魂. (13) [Subtitle]: 麵體比較粗 可是炒入醬以後 是整個都吸飽的. (14) [Subtitle]: 配上蘿蔔絲甜甜的. (15) [Subtitle]: 還有配袖珍菇跟香菇 青江菜配料給的很豐富哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 我還蠻喜歡他的配菜. (17) [Variety]: 會很飽. [Subtitle]: 總而言之你月底吃這個 會很飽 而且價格很划算.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator wearing a beret, 1 female friend sitting at the table eating.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue beret, large earrings, and a dark blue off-the-shoulder blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial background is a Costco warehouse aisle with bright refrigerated display units. Later, the background shifts to a modern home kitchen with a gas stove and a dining area with shelves and decorative items.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins narrating immediately with a bright tone. An upbeat, synthesized background music track with a bouncy, major-mode rhythm starts simultaneously. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect occurs as visual text pops up. (3) The acoustic environment shifts to include the rhythmic sizzling sound of stir-frying meat and vegetables. (4) A distinct 'glug' and splashing sound of liquid sauce being poured is heard clearly over the BGM. (5) Soft percussive clicking and subtle slurping sounds occur as people eat. (6) The female narrator concludes with a high-arousal summary, her voice rising in pitch to emphasize the value of the product.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Process -> Tasting & Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend a specific prepared food item from Costco (Cantonese Fried Noodles) as a delicious and budget-friendly meal option for viewers, particularly targeting those looking for value at the end of the month.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of product packaging, price, cooking process, and highly positive review based on personal experience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-energy social media editing style with frequent text overlays and upbeat music to maintain engagement while providing practical consumer information.
